flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Dallas Baptist University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.6k → $40.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Dallas Baptist University rose 20% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.6k → $40.2k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Dallas Baptist University fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7k → 2.4k).
